title: Crash using aggregate function inside a case statement in having clause
poc:
select
     "c1",
     sum("d1") as "d1",
     sum("d2") as "d2"
 from "t1"
 group by "c1"
 having sum("d1") < case when 5 > 10 then 500 else 400 end;

select
     "c1",
     sum("d1")as "d1",
     sum("d2") as "d2",
     1.0 * sum("d1") / (1.0 * case when sum("d2") > 0 then sum("d2") else null end) as "formula"
 from "t1"
 group by "c1";

select
     "c1",
     sum("d1")as "d1",
     sum("d2") as "d2",
     1.0 * sum("d1") / (1.0 * case when sum("d2") > 0 then sum("d2") else null end) as "formula"
 from "t1"
 group by "c1"
 having (1.0 * sum("d1") / (1.0 * case when sum("d2") > 0 then sum("d2") else null end)) > 1;
key_bug_features: Aggregate function in case statement within having clause
bug_features_seed: SELECT "c1", SUM("d1") AS "total_d1", SUM("d2") AS "total_d2" FROM "t2" GROUP BY "c1" HAVING SUM("d1") < CASE WHEN SUM("d2") > 100 THEN 600 ELSE 500 END;
SELECT "c1", COUNT(*) AS "count", AVG("d1") AS "avg_d1" FROM "t2" GROUP BY "c1" HAVING AVG("d1") > CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 2 THEN 100 ELSE 50 END;
SELECT "c1", SUM("d1") AS "total_d1", SUM("d2") AS "total_d2", CASE WHEN SUM("d1") IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE SUM("d1") END AS "safe_sum" FROM "t2" GROUP BY "c1" HAVING safe_sum < 300;
